pageTimings.text: A flower has petals. A flower has a stem. A flower has roots.
A sunflower is tall and yellow. The sun makes it grow.
A daisy is small and white. It grows in the grass.
A rose is red. It smells sweet. It has sharp thorns.
Trees have roots under the soil. Roots hold the tree up.
Some trees lose their leaves in autumn. In winter, the branches are bare.
Some trees keep their leaves all year. They are called evergreen trees.
Flowers and trees are plants. They need sun, soil, and water.
